name: Job Portal
desc: Full-stack job portal web app with authentication, job posting, applications, profile management, and recruiter-student access using MERN Stack.

name: AI Video Assistant - RAG
desc: AI-powered video/audio intelligence platform for transcription, summarization, structured content generation, and context-aware Q&A using Whisper, LLMs, LangChain, ChromaDB, and RAG.

name: Blogging Community
desc: Full-stack blogging platform with authentication, rich text editing, media upload, search, sorting, and blog management using MERN Stack.

name: Insurance Premium
desc: Built an Insurance Premium Prediction API using FastAPI and Machine Learning to estimate insurance costs based on user attributes, with input validation and error handling.

name: Placement Cell Website
desc: Full-stack placement portal with, job tracking, student profiles, announcements, and recruiter-student management using MERN Stack.

name: Deepfake Detection
desc: AI/ML-powered deepfake detection web app with image/video analysis, secure uploads, instant results, and responsive UI.
